linux-gfx90a.blocked_reason: Largest MOAT port (~42K LOC). FULL afcuda shared library + all 132 CUDA-tagged gtest binaries BUILD and LINK for gfx90a at fork 96edd3a. The hipRTC runtime-JIT engine is GPU-validated (jit 1779/1781), and the core ops reduce sum/min/max/all/any (120/120, after the wave64 reduce.hpp rework), random (513), set, dot, moddims, reorder (233/334), sort/join partial PASS on gfx90a. Library swaps (hipBLAS/hipSOLVER/hipFFT/rocThrust) + the void* tag-keyed handles + POD complex + wave64 staging landed. STILL porting (core not fully green): the biggest remaining wall is JIT ops whose runtime source pulls common/half.hpp's half<->int CONVERSIONS, which fail to hipRTC-compile with a __device__-intrinsic-from-__host__ attribute mismatch -> AF_ERR_INTERNAL (blocks transpose/scan/fft); plus a strided-gemm blas core dump, reduce-by-key/ragged wave64 correctness, and the deferred sparse/CV-kernel/convolveNN follow-ons. Precise next-step fix + full results in notes.md (Session 2 FINAL). -> ported only after the JIT-half wall is cleared and the gtest core passes.
